fato_historico: 1545: The Tudor warship Mary Rose sinks off Portsmouth; in 1982 the wreck is salvaged in one of the most complex and expensive projects in the history of maritime archaeology.
energia_do_dia: Today brings a powerful reminder that what once seemed lost beneath the tides may finally be ready for a glorious resurfacing. Just as ancient treasures rise from the sea to reveal their stories, you might feel a gentle pull to uncover parts of your soul that were long submerged. It is a good time to explore your depths.
frase_do_dia: The depths hold secrets that bring us wisdom when we finally choose to look.
significado_numero: Represents the completion of a cycle and the path to fulfillment.
conselho: Consider revisiting an old passion or dream you set aside long ago.
